title: Cloud Guard Instance Security: Findings by Pack Query
description: Shows which OSQuery pack queries are producing the most findings.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Cloud Guard Instance Security Logs' | stats count as Findings, unique('OSQuery Finding') as FindingSamples by 'Pack Name', 'Pack Query ID', 'Pack Query Name', 'Finding Severity' | sort -Findings

candidates: SOC Cloud Guard Instance Security Logs
